chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-290 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.04.2025 Mr. Om Parkash H. Karmani, advocate for the petitioner(s) <>*<> Learned counsel for the petitioner after arguing the matter at length submits that since the application, as to pay the decreetal amount through easy instalments, has been dismissed by the learned Banking Court Mirpurkhas vide Order dated 07.04.2025 passed in executing proceedings, therefore, the petitioner will avail the remedy before the competent forum in accordance with law and does not wish to press this petition. In view of the above, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed, leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail the remedy before the competent forum, if so desire, in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE *Sajjad*
